search_records.query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.searched_query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.search_notes: Kept results to lastzwiki.com only. Prioritized direct guide/wiki pages over the home page. No claim should be treated as player-facing proof from a single page.

results.title: Heroes - Last Z Wiki | Tier List, Stats & Complete Character Guide 2026
results.evidence_summary: Hero hub with tier list, stats, factions, and hero equipment sections; useful for hero roster discovery and cross-checking character pages.
results.primary_user_job: Find hero roster and build context
claims_to_verify: hero equipment entries and stat values
hero level references shown on the page

results.title: Laboratory Badges in Last Z - Complete Research Guide | Last Z Wiki
results.evidence_summary: Research table hub with badge costs by level across laboratory categories; useful for research discovery and mechanic mapping.
results.primary_user_job: Find research categories and cost tables
claims_to_verify: total badge requirements for named researches

results.title: Beginner's Guide - Last Z Wiki | How to Start & Essential Tips 2026
results.evidence_summary: Early-game guide that mentions hero progression, alliances, and basic resource flow; useful for onboarding and related topic discovery.
results.primary_user_job: Understand early progression and hero basics

search_records.searched_query: site:last-z.wiki Last Z heroes events research cost

search_records.no_results_reason: No search results from www.last-z.wiki for the requested query.

search_records.search_notes: Search was limited to the approved domain only. No matching pages were returned for the query.
search_records.no_results_reason: No indexed pages were found for the approved domain and query.

search_records.query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.searched_query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.search_notes: Limited to lastz.fandom.com only. Results prioritize concrete wiki mechanic pages over generic index pages. No page should be treated as proof by itself for player-facing mechanics, costs, rewards, seasons, or events.

results.title: Full Preparedness | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Daily event cycle includes a research-focused theme and a hero-focused theme; useful for linking research and hero upgrade mechanics to event scoring.
results.primary_user_job: Find which daily event themes reward research or hero upgrades.
claims_to_verify: Event themes and their point actions

results.title: Laboratory | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Core building for technology research; good cross-check for research-related event tasks.
results.primary_user_job: Understand where tech research happens and what unlocks it.

results.title: Technologies | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Main tech tree page showing research costs and research-speed techs; useful for identifying research mechanics touched by events.
results.primary_user_job: See what can be researched and what resources research consumes.

search_records.search_notes: Search constrained to www.packsify.com returned no indexed results for the requested Last Z gear guide query. No discovery leads found within the allowed domain.
search_records.no_results_reason: No matching indexed pages found on www.packsify.com for the requested query.

search_records.search_notes: Search was restricted to mmediamreza.com and returned several Last Z-specific guide pages that are suitable for topic discovery and cross-validation. Generic or non-Last Z pages were not included.

results.title: Shooter Camp Guide - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Guide page for Shooter Camp, covering training cap, speed, and upgrade table data for long-range units.
results.primary_user_job: Plan shooter troop growth and training upgrades.
claims_to_verify: Exact level-by-level costs, cap, speed, and power values
Promotion rules for higher-level Shooter units

results.title: Assaulter Camp Guide - Train Faster & Gain Power - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Guide page for Assaulter Camp, focused on training cap, training speed, and power progression for assault units.
results.primary_user_job: Plan assaulter troop growth and training upgrades.
claims_to_verify: Exact level progression for cap, speed, and power

results.title: Last Z Laboratory Guide: Tech Research & Lab No. 2 Unlocking - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Reference page for Lab research, including tech progression and the second laboratory unlock.
results.primary_user_job: Understand research progression and lab scaling.
